texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. The above contract rates are based on per-night stays.
texts.text: The above contract rates are based on per-night stays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Travel agents may not sell room rates above our walk-in net rates.
texts.text: Travel agents may not sell room rates above our walk-in net rates.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Check-in time is 2:00 pm, and check-out time is 10:30 am.
texts.text: 4. Check-in time is 2:00 pm, and check-out time is 10:30 am.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Late check-out until 1300 Hours is subject to 25% of the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late check-out until 1300 Hours is subject to 25% of the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Late check-out until 1600 Hours is subject to 50% of the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late check-out until 1600 Hours is subject to 50% of the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. Late check-out after 1700 Hours is subject to 100% of the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late check-out after 1700 Hours is subject to 100% of the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. Early check-ins are subject to room availability and prior notification is required.
texts.text: Early check-ins are subject to room availability and prior notification is required.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. Early check-outs (more than 24 hours) are subject to a 1-day room rate penalty from the existing contract rate
texts.text: Early check-outs (more than 24 hours) are subject to a 1-day room rate penalty from the existing contract rate

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Terms and Conditions for FIT & GIT Reservations
texts.text: Terms and Conditions for FIT & GIT Reservations

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. The Management will provide a written confirmation via return email.
texts.text: The Management will provide a written confirmation via return email.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Cancellations or amendments must be made in writing via email.
texts.text: Cancellations or amendments must be made in writing via email.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. The Management will provide written confirmation of cancellations or amendments via return email.
texts.text: The Management will provide written confirmation of cancellations or amendments via return email.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Cancellations made less than 3 days prior to arrival will incur a 50% charge of the total booking. Noshows will be charged 100% of the total booking.
texts.text: Cancellations made less than 3 days prior to arrival will incur a 50% charge of the total booking. Noshows will be charged 100% of the total booking.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: b. Cancellations made less than 7 days prior to arrival will incur a 10% charge of the total booking. Noshows will be charged 100% of the total booking.
texts.text: b. Cancellations made less than 7 days prior to arrival will incur a 10% charge of the total booking. Noshows will be charged 100% of the total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. Cancellations made less than 14 days prior to arrival will incur a 5% charge of the total booking. Noshows will still be charged 100% of the total booking.
texts.text: Cancellations made less than 14 days prior to arrival will incur a 5% charge of the total booking. Noshows will still be charged 100% of the total booking.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: a. A pro-forma invoice will be sent upon reservation confirmation. A 50% deposit must be settled at least 7 days prior to the guest arrival date, and full payment must be settled upon guest arrival.
texts.text: a. A pro-forma invoice will be sent upon reservation confirmation. A 50% deposit must be settled at least 7 days prior to the guest arrival date, and full payment must be settled upon guest arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: b. Reservations are guaranteed only upon payment of a 50% deposit. If the deposit is not paid in full as stipulated, Lake Elementaita Manor reserves the right to cancel the booking and will not be held liable for any inconveniences or losses incurred by the travel company or the guest.
texts.text: b. Reservations are guaranteed only upon payment of a 50% deposit. If the deposit is not paid in full as stipulated, Lake Elementaita Manor reserves the right to cancel the booking and will not be held liable for any inconveniences or losses incurred by the travel company or the guest.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: c. Unsettled invoices after the due date will incur a 10% interest per day of the total outstanding amount. Lake Elementaita Manor reserves the right to refuse any future bookings.
texts.text: c. Unsettled invoices after the due date will incur a 10% interest per day of the total outstanding amount. Lake Elementaita Manor reserves the right to refuse any future bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. Payments may be made via cash or bank transfer:
texts.text: Payments may be made via cash or bank transfer:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. All contract rates are net inclusive of taxes, service charges, and are non-commissionable.
texts.text: All contract rates are net inclusive of taxes, service charges, and are non-commissionable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: a. This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designated clientele. Disclosure to third parties without authorization will automatically terminate this agreement.
texts.text: a. This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designated clientele. Disclosure to third parties without authorization will automatically terminate this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: b. Amendments to this agreement must be made in writing and agreed upon by authorized representatives of both parties.
texts.text: b. Amendments to this agreement must be made in writing and agreed upon by authorized representatives of both parties.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: a. A valid voucher is required before guest arrival or upon check-in. Failure to provide a valid voucher before departure will result in the application of normal published rack rates, and payment will fall on the guest's personal account.
texts.text: a. A valid voucher is required before guest arrival or upon check-in. Failure to provide a valid voucher before departure will result in the application of normal published rack rates, and payment will fall on the guest's personal account.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Deluxe rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults (baby cots available upon request).
texts.text: Deluxe rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults (baby cots available upon request).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Twin rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults.
texts.text: Twin rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults.

texts.text: Children below 5 years sharing with adults - Free of charge.

texts.label: list_item
